copy_rules: Use signal, pattern, trend, current outlook, and current evidence.
Avoid destiny, guaranteed outcome, diagnosis, final truth, doomed, and soulmate certainty.
Use present-tense language and avoid prophetic framing.
Do not equate readiness with personal worth.

templates.primary_score_card: Your current Readiness score is {{score}}. This is a signal of how steady and relationship-ready your current patterns look right now.
templates.band_only_low_confidence: We are still gathering enough real evidence to turn this into a stronger signal. For now, your readiness looks {{band_label}}.
templates.readiness_explanation: This score reflects your current mix of consistency, emotional regulation, and follow-through — not your worth.
templates.improvement_nudge: Your score can move when your patterns move. Reflection, repair, and steadier behavior matter more than perfect answers.
templates.suppressed_due_to_stale_evidence: Your readiness signal is paused until we have fresher evidence.
templates.readiness_dip: Your score dipped because the system sees more pressure than steadiness right now. That is a signal to slow down and reset, not a verdict about your future.
templates.contradiction_cluster: Some of your answers and behaviors are pulling in different directions. Before your score can rise, the system needs to see those signals settle.

bands.label: Not relationship-ready right now
bands.meaning: High instability, contradiction, or active disruption is still present.

bands.label: Needs grounding before deeper connection
bands.meaning: Some capacity is present, but reliable readiness is not yet stable.

bands.label: Emerging readiness
bands.meaning: Functional signs exist, but the system still sees pressure points.

bands.label: Relationship-ready with normal growth edges
bands.meaning: This is a generally healthy operating range.

bands.label: Strong readiness signal
bands.meaning: Current evidence supports a high-functioning profile with steadiness and follow-through.

copy_rules: Forecast is a governed outlook family, not a guarantee.
Forecast must never sound like fate, prophecy, or diagnosis.
If confidence is low, say that plainly and avoid numeric theater.

templates.forecast_intro: Forecast shows the current outlook of this connection based on shared evidence, not a guaranteed future.
templates.low_evidence_pair: Not enough shared evidence yet to show a full forecast. As this connection develops, the signal will sharpen.
templates.strong_pair_stability: Current evidence suggests a strong stability outlook if both people keep showing up the same way.
templates.elevated_rupture_risk: The current pattern shows pressure around conflict and recovery. That does not equal failure, but it does call for care.
templates.good_repair_capacity: You both show signs of coming back together after tension instead of getting stuck in it.
templates.forecast_guarded: This connection still has more questions than proof. Move slower. Let behavior answer what chemistry cannot.
templates.repair_nudge: The strongest improvement here will not come from saying the right thing once — it will come from what happens after tension.

copy_rules: Chemistry explains felt pull, not long-term fate.
Do not oversell chaos as destiny.
Translate polarity fit, pursuit rhythm, and attraction pattern in calm language.

templates.card_intro: Chemistry explains the felt pull in this match. It is not the same thing as readiness or long-term stability.
templates.strong_chemistry: The chemistry layer looks strong. Attraction, rhythm, and polarity fit are doing real work here.
templates.steady_chemistry: Chemistry is present and workable. It supports the match without needing drama to stay alive.
templates.mixed_chemistry: There is chemistry here, but it may not be the clearest driver of the connection yet.
templates.guarded_chemistry: The chemistry signal is lighter right now. Stability, communication, or pacing may matter more than spark.
templates.pursuit_rhythm_note: Chemistry can feel strong while pacing still needs care. Attraction and stability are siblings, not twins.
templates.polarity_note: Polarity helps explain initiation, receptivity, tension, and ease. It does not replace the core score.

CL_VULN_LOOP.explanation: You may genuinely want closeness and honesty, then feel overloaded once intimacy becomes emotionally real.
CL_VULN_LOOP.coaching: Slow the pace just enough that closeness still feels safe after it starts.

CL_CONTROL_AVOID.explanation: When structure, definition, or accountability starts to feel like pressure, you may protect autonomy through delay, ambiguity, or selective disengagement.
CL_CONTROL_AVOID.coaching: Practice cleaner pacing and more direct clarity before the other person has to carry all the definition work.

CL_DRIFT_SLOW.explanation: The connection is not exploding — it is gradually losing continuity, reciprocity, or shared upkeep across the active evidence window.
CL_DRIFT_SLOW.coaching: Look for steadying moves: timely response, completed plans, and actual repair after friction.

CL_PUSH_PULL.explanation: One or both people may intensify and then withdraw, creating a cycle that keeps chemistry alive but makes continuity expensive.
CL_PUSH_PULL.coaching: Do not outsource clarity to chemistry spikes. Slow the swings and protect steadier reciprocity.

CL_REPAIR_GAP.explanation: The issue is not that conflict happened. The issue is that repair is absent, delayed, or not strong enough to actually restore safety.
CL_REPAIR_GAP.coaching: Make the next repair attempt concrete: acknowledge the issue, return after the pause, and follow through.

CL_READY_OVR.explanation: Your current readiness signal is being held back because the evidence does not fully match the confidence or seriousness you are presenting.
CL_READY_OVR.coaching: Let behavior catch up to intention. Stable follow-through matters more than sounding ready.

SAN_STILL.title: Stillness
SAN_STILL.entry_copy: Use Stillness to slow the body down and create a cleaner emotional baseline before you react.
SAN_STILL.completion_copy: Take a second to notice what shifted. Even a small drop in pressure counts.
SAN_STILL.ai_failure_fallback: Stillness is still available without AI. You can complete the reset with the guided timer and check-in.

SAN_MIRROR.title: Emotional Mirror
SAN_MIRROR.entry_copy: Use Emotional Mirror when you need words for what you are feeling and what might be underneath it.
SAN_MIRROR.completion_copy: You do not have to treat one reflection like a permanent identity statement. Take what is useful and leave the rest.
SAN_MIRROR.sparse_input_fallback: Not enough signal yet for a deep mirror. Start with a simpler feeling label and build from there.

SAN_WHISPER.title: Whisper Window
SAN_WHISPER.entry_copy: Use Whisper Window when you need to say something honestly, soften it, or keep it private without sending it yet.
SAN_WHISPER.completion_copy: You can keep this private, refine it, or turn it into a cleaner message when you are ready.
SAN_WHISPER.safety_redirect: This draft is too sharp to send as-is. Slow down, keep it private for now, and choose a safer version.

SAN_GHOST.title: Ghost Mode
SAN_GHOST.entry_copy: Ghost Mode gives you emotional shelter without taking away your private reflection tools.
SAN_GHOST.completion_copy: Your visibility has been updated. This is a privacy choice, not a punishment.
SAN_GHOST.cooldown_copy: Some surfaces are muted for now. You can still reflect privately while your visibility settings hold.

shared.safety_hold: This looks heavier than a normal reflection flow. Let us slow down and move more carefully.
shared.suppressed: This module is not available right now because a policy or visibility rule is in the way.

refusal_classes.self_harm_or_crisis: I cannot treat this like a normal reflection request. Your safety matters more than the product flow right now.
refusal_classes.coercion_or_stalking: I cannot help with pressure, surveillance, or coercive behavior. I can help you communicate directly and respectfully instead.
refusal_classes.manipulation_request: I cannot help you manipulate another person. I can help you say what you mean clearly and cleanly.
refusal_classes.non_consented_partner_exposure: I cannot expose another person's private data or hidden internal signals without consent.
refusal_classes.clinical_or_diagnostic_request: I cannot diagnose you or another person. I can help translate patterns, pressure points, and current signals in plain language.
